description: Every 5 meters your target is away from you grants +2% weapon damage. Caps at 30 meters (+12%).
Killing a target within 7 meters grants +30% weapon damage for 10 seconds.
Hitting a pulsed or tracked enemy deals 15% additional weapon damage.
Top half of magazine has +15% rate of fire and -20% weapon damage. Bottom half has -15% rate of fire and +30% weapon damage.
Landing body shots adds a stack of +5% headshot damage. Max 3 stacks. Stacks reset on headshot or after 10 seconds.
Gain +10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are firing. Max 5 stacks. Stacks reset when not firing for 1 second.
Killing an enemy repairs 10% armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills double the repair.
Critical hit kills grant +30% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.
Weapon damage is increased by +3% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.
Killing a status-affected enemy grants +18% critical hit chance to you and nearby allies for 10 seconds.
